since_last: 64% of 99 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.86%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.84% · Gold -0.38% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 64% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.86%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.86%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +3.71%
cards.body: Leaders: META +3.71%, BABA +2.05%, WDAY +1.92%, CGNX +1.55%, CEVA +1.51%. Laggards: LSCC -2.45%, INTC -1.60%, AMBA -1.21%, SPCX -0.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.92% at $150.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.92% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
